Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei invited me to join him at[n]the hot spring. I should talk to[n]him before going to my room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I go back to my room and[n]get ready to hit the hot spring?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I changed into a yukata, but I still have[n]some free time before I go to bed.[n]{f 1 1}
